DigitalBridge is currently pursuing Middle East investments in digital assets (cell towers, data centers, fiber optics, telecommunications, and related technologies) including those located in Abu Dhabi, Kuwait, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and Turkey. The company's investor population includes a variety of Middle East and Near East investors. Additional underlying holdings of this Partnership are set forth in lines Part 2 Lines 8.1 - 8.1.1.1,8.2.1.1 - 8.2.1.1.1.1, 8.4 - 8.4.3.1.1.151 and Part 6 lines 11-11.1.1.2.

A major initiative of DigitalBridge funds is establishing joint ventures and co-investments in a variety of Middle East countries; focusing on investments in digital assets (cell towers, data centers, fiber optics, telecommunications, and related technologies) in those countries including Abu Dhabi, Kuwait, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and Turkey. We have identified those ventures that have been completed but the acquisition process is ongoing in various countries. The mission statement of these funds includes major investments in a co-investment basis that may involve governmental entities.
